2603.22913.title: Multilingual KokoroChat: A Multi-LLM Ensemble Translation Method for Creating a Multilingual Counseling Dialogue Dataset
2603.22913.paper_summary: To address the critical scarcity of high-quality, publicly available counseling dialogue datasets, we created Multilingual KokoroChat by translating KokoroChat, a large-scale manually authored Japanese counseling corpus, into both English and Chinese. A key challenge in this process is that the optimal model for translation varies by input, making it impossible for any single model to consistently guarantee the highest quality. In a sensitive domain like counseling, where the highest possible translation fidelity is essential, relying on a single LLM is therefore insufficient. To overcome this challenge, we developed and employed a novel multi-LLM ensemble method. Our approach first generates diverse hypotheses from multiple distinct LLMs. A single LLM then produces a high-quality translation based on an analysis of the respective strengths and weaknesses of all presented hypotheses. The quality of ``Multilingual KokoroChat'' was rigorously validated through human preference studies. These evaluations confirmed that the translations produced by our ensemble method were preferred from any individual state-of-the-art LLM. This strong preference confirms the superior quality of our method's outputs. The Multilingual KokoroChat is available at https://github.com/UEC-InabaLab/MultilingualKokoroChat.
2603.22913.paper_summary_zh: 為了解決高品質、公開可用的諮詢對話數據集的嚴重短缺，我們通過將大規模手動編寫的日本諮詢語料庫KokoroChat翻譯成英文和中文，創建了多語言KokoroChat。在這個過程中，一個主要挑戰是最佳的翻譯模型因輸入而異，使得任何單一模型都無法持續保證最高質量。在像諮詢這樣的敏感領域中，最高可能的翻譯忠實度至關重要，因此依賴單一的LLM是不夠的。為了克服這一挑戰，我們開發並採用了新穎的多LLM集成方法。我們的方法首先從多個不同的LLM生成多樣化的假設。然後，單一的LLM根據對所有呈現的假設的各自優缺點的分析，生成高品質的翻譯。“多語言KokoroChat”的質量通過人類偏好研究進行了嚴格的驗證。這些評估確認我們的集成方法所產生的翻譯比任何單一的最先進LLM更受青睞。這一強烈的偏好確認了我們方法產出質量的優越性。多語言KokoroChat可在https://github.com/UEC-InabaLab/MultilingualKokoroChat獲得。
2603.22913.author: Ryoma Suzuki et.al.
2603.22913.authors: Ryoma Suzuki, Zhiyang Qi, Michimasa Inaba
